message:
fix: TCP split test guard drops + Lean frontier bucket elimination assertion

tcp/split.rs tests:
- Add explicit drop(state) before end of three test functions to
  release MutexGuard before implicit drops, preventing potential
  deadlocks in test failure paths
- Remove unnecessary cx.clone() (use move semantics directly)
- Move init_test() call after struct definitions in
  dropping_write_half_wakes_survivor_when_reregistration_fails to
  avoid test logging initialization before type definitions
- Add explicit drop(state) in deregister path of mock reactor

lean_frontier_buckets.rs:
- Add assertion that declaration-order.helper-availability bucket
  remains eliminated after bd-53a0d ordering stabilization pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
